universe.name: Aetheria
universe.description: A high-fantasy world of warring orders and old magic.

codexCategories.label: Factions
codexCategories.description: Orders, guilds, and powers that shape the world.

characters.name: Lyra Dawnwhisper
characters.description: An archmage of the Azure Order, exiled for a heresy she did not commit.

characters.name: Garrett Stone
characters.description: A knight-captain sworn to ${pl:silverhold}[Silverhold], torn between duty and conscience.

places.name: Silverhold
places.description: A fortress city carved into the white cliffs, seat of the Azure Order.

plotlines.title: The Shattered Crown
plotlines.description: The succession crisis that follows the old king's death.

events.name: The Contested Coronation
events.description: Two claimants are crowned on the same day within ${pl:silverhold}[Silverhold].

codexEntries.title: The Azure Order
codexEntries.description: An ancient circle of mages. ${ch:lyra-dawnwhisper}[Lyra Dawnwhisper] was once its brightest member.

stories.title: The Gathering Storm
stories.description: Lyra returns to Silverhold on the eve of the coronation.

arrival.text: Rain lashed the white cliffs as ${ch:lyra-dawnwhisper}[Lyra] climbed the last stair to the gate.

the-gate.text: The gate groaned open. ${ch:garrett-stone}[Garrett Stone] stood in the torchlight, one hand on his sword.

the-hall.text: Inside, the Order's banners hung heavy and damp. Whatever welcome she had hoped for, this was not it.
